summary: Comprehensive test suite that covers all major requirements: both JUnit XML and JSON parsers, aggregation logic, flaky test detection, markdown generation, and workflow integration. Strong unit testing via Pester (46 tests total) with well-designed fixtures that exercise multiple scenarios (passing, failing, skipped, flaky tests across matrix runs). The act-based test harness validates workflow structure, runs actionlint, and asserts on exact output values. Main limitations: no testing of malformed XML/JSON, missing edge cases (empty test suites, boundary duration values, special characters), and no parametric tests. The test suite would reliably catch regressions in normal operation and workflow structure but would miss edge cases and error scenarios beyond missing files.
